Study phaseEventsNotes
Baseline periodDaily diaries for drug use and cravingsRecorded for 1 week
Treatment 1Two 30-minute sessions for 3 1/2 daysSessions separated by 3 to 6 hours
Cue-induced craving EEG sessionEvent-Related Potential (ERP) recordings following neutral and drug-related cuesSession began 1 hour after last Transcutaneous Electric Acupoint Stimulation (TEAS) treatment
Washout period2 weeks in lengthNo treatments; continue to record drug use and cravings in diaries
Treatment 2Two 30-minute sessions for 3 1/2 daysSessions separated by 3 to 6 hours
